title: C3 grammar appendix
manager: The normative grammar appendix — one authoritative, compact grammar for all the new v6-and-later constructs (declarations, expressions, assign, where, contracts, weighted label lists, channels, factories, system headers) — the document a second implementation parses against and the source the grammar exports are generated from. The proof-construct slice (fsl#818) ships first because it unblocks the example corpus. Without a pinned grammar, "valid FSL" is just whatever the one parser happens to accept that day.
cs: C3 normative grammar appendix (era-1 WP-1.3, §29); fsl#818 proof-construct slice first (unblocks corpus #817); rides the generator/parser dual; the source for grammar exports (W6.108) and format (W6.102).
